transcript:
Speaker A (Arya): तुला किती भाऊ आहेत [How many brothers do you have?]
Speaker B (Shreya): I am having two brothers.
Speaker A (Arya): Having नाही. आता हातात धरून ठेवले आहेत का दोघांना? असं बोल, I have two brothers. [Not having. Are you holding them in your hands right now? Say it like this, I have two brothers.]
Speaker B (Shreya): ओ, ठीक आहे ठीक आहे. मला English नीट येतच नाही. [Oh, okay okay. I don't know English well.]
Speaker A (Arya): काही problem नाही. AI teachers try केलं का? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?]
Speaker B (Shreya): ते महाग असतील ना? [They must be expensive, right?]
Speaker A (Arya): अजिबात नाही. normal English classes पेक्षा ७ पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून १ कोटी लोक MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Speaker B (Shreya): पण वेळच मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.]
Speaker A (Arya): रोज फक्त १५-२० मिनिटे practice पुरेशी आहे. अगदी confident व्हाल. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will become very confident.]
Speaker B (Shreya): Wow! कसं join करू? [Wow! How do I join?]
Speaker A (Arya): हा install चा button दाबा आणि MySivi app install करा. sign up करा आणि practice start करा. फक्त १५ दिवसांत तुम्हाला improvement दिसायला लागेल. चला, सुरू करा. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. In just 15 days, you will start seeing improvement. Come on, start.]

summary: The ad features a conversation between two AI avatars where one corrects the other's incorrect English grammar. It highlights MySivi as an affordable, time-efficient AI English learning app that costs only ₹1. The call to action encourages users to install the app to see improvement in 15 days.
